programmes.show_description: Start your week with a first look at some of the most exciting limited time offers at QVC across home, garden, beauty and fashion in The Big Deal Morning Show.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
The beauty tools you use are as important as your products, so enjoy professional-standard implements and accessories, from lash curlers to make-up bags and tweezers to brushes.
The beauty tools you use are as important as your products, so enjoy professional-standard implements and accessories, from lash curlers to make-up bags and tweezers to brushes.

Join us for an hour of fantastic DIY and gardening items at great value prices - perfect for all projects big and small.
Create a warm and cosy sanctuary in your home, with the Cozee Home range of snuggly bedding, throws and accessories offering comfort and coziness in your home.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Plant Your Garden with Michael.
Plant Your Garden with Michael.
Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Find a range of year round practical home solutions from homewares and cleaning to electronics and DIY home improvement tools. This show will bring you the products you need to enhance your home.
It's the time of year to make a new start, so why not begin with your bedroom? Discover a wealth of comfy and chic bedding solutions, from featherbeds and mattress toppers to smart duvet sets.
Tired of those joggers? Reset your style with our range of on-trend must-haves and get that confidence boost from looking (and feeling) amazing!
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Discover QVC's signature brand of high quality kitchenware. Innovative appliances loved by cooking novices and budding chefs alike, this range brings performance and practicality to your kitchen.
Experience the science of better sleep with Simba Sleep. Discover innovative mattresses, pillows and bedding designed to deliver comfort, support and a restful night.
Transform your culinary experience with Ninja! Effortlessly create tasty, healthy dishes with globally acclaimed appliances perfect for any occasion. Elevate your kitchen game now!
Join us for an hour of fantastic DIY and gardening items at great value prices - perfect for all projects big and small.

Dive into our jewellery box and discover dazzling jewellery deals from 20% off. From exquisite necklaces to beautiful bracelets, snap up a sparkling steal today!
